All three changes applied and deployed:

1. **Attack speed 10x** — `/mnt/data/commons-server/src/dungeon/stats.ts`: changed `autoAttackIntervalMs` formula from `60 / (1 + SPD * 0.05)` to `6 / (1 + SPD * 0.05)`.

2. **Mob count 10x** — `/mnt/data/commons-server/src/dungeon/dungeon-loop.ts`: `enemy_budget` multiplied by 10 across all three floor templates (30/50/70 → 300/500/700). Boss spawning is separate (hardcoded per `boss_type_id`, not budget-based), so bosses are unaffected.
